channel.title: NAA Kawaguchi, G Bernier, J Lacroix, S El Salti, MP Cheng, TC Lee, K Khwaja, P Jouvet | PlatCOVID

image.title: NAA Kawaguchi, G Bernier, J Lacroix, S El Salti, MP Cheng, TC Lee, K Khwaja, P Jouvet

item.title: Comparison of two methods to clear the airways of critically ill children and adults with COVID-19 infection: a structured summary of a study protocol for a pilot randomized controlled trial.
